name: Shelkopolis
seasonal_change: Balanced seasonal weather preserves outdoor markets and floral ornamentation; observance bands intensify noble and artisan gatherings.
seasonal_effects: Balanced seasonal weather preserves outdoor markets and floral ornamentation; observance bands intensify noble and artisan gatherings.
Public schedules, prices, crowding, and enforcement intensity all change before locals bother explaining why.
Ceremony, supply pressure, and route reliability do not all peak at the same time, forcing local adaptation.
